lines: Nzaririmb' igitangaza,Yes' Umwami yakoze; Ko yavuy' i We mw ijuru Ngw amfir’ i Gologota.
Nzaririmb' igitangaza Yes' Umwami yakoze: Ndi kumwe n'abo mw ijuru Imbere ya ya ntebe.
Nari nzimiye nk' intama Maze Yes' arambona; 'Nukw anshyira ku bitugu, Ansubiza mu nzira.
Nar' impumyi, mfit' u’bwoba Nshits' intege, mbabaye, Njanjaguritse, nihebye, Maze Yes' arankiza.
Ndacyabon' ibimbabaza; Haracyar' ibindushya; Nyamar' u’bwo turi kumwe, Nzi yuko nta cyo nzaba.
Azanyuza no mu rupfu,Nambuke na rwa Ruzi; Maze, ni mfata hakurya, Nzasangay' abo nkunda.
